actions.name: Run Timer
actions.customAction: (function(){if(window._occTimer)clearInterval(window._occTimer);function getET(d){var f=new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-US',{timeZone:'America/New_York',year:'numeric',month:'2-digit',day:'2-digit',hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit',second:'2-digit',hour12:false,timeZoneName:'shortOffset'});var p={};f.formatToParts(d).forEach(function(x){p[x.type]=x.value;});var m=p.timeZoneName&&p.timeZoneName.match(/GMT([+-]\d+)/);var dst=m?parseInt(m[1])===-4:false;return{year:parseInt(p.year),month:parseInt(p.month)-1,day:parseInt(p.day),hours:parseInt(p.hour),minutes:parseInt(p.minute),seconds:parseInt(p.second),isDST:dst};}function nextBizDay(y,m,d){var dt=new Date(Date.UTC(y,m,d+1));while(dt.getUTCDay()===0||dt.getUTCDay()===6){dt.setUTCDate(dt.getUTCDate()+1);}return dt;}function pad(n){return String(n).padStart(2,'0');}function update(){var now=new Date();var et=getET(now);var cutoffHourUTC=et.isDST?21:22;var cutoff=Date.UTC(et.year,et.month,et.day,cutoffHourUTC,0,0);var diff=cutoff-now.getTime();var before=diff>0;var sec=Math.floor(Math.abs(diff)/1000);var cd=document.getElementById('occ-countdown');if(!cd)return;cd.textContent=pad(Math.floor(sec/3600))+':'+pad(Math.floor((sec%3600)/60))+':'+pad(sec%60);cd.style.color=before?(sec<3600?'#b45309':'#111'):'#999';var opts={weekday:'long',month:'long',day:'numeric',timeZone:'UTC'};var orderDate=before?new Date(Date.UTC(et.year,et.month,et.day)):nextBizDay(et.year,et.month,et.day);var isToday=before;document.getElementById('occ-suffix').textContent=before?'remaining':'since cutoff';document.getElementById('occ-label').textContent=before?'Order by 5:00 PM ET for same-day processing':'Cutoff passed — order will process next business day';document.getElementById('occ-date').textContent=orderDate.toLocaleDateString('en-US',opts);var bg=document.getElementById('occ-badge');bg.textContent=isToday?'Today':'Next business day';bg.style.background=isToday?'#dcfce7':'#dbeafe';bg.style.color=isToday?'#166534':'#1e40af';document.getElementById('occ-note').textContent='Current ET: '+pad(et.hours)+':'+pad(et.minutes)+':'+pad(et.seconds)+' '+(et.isDST?'EDT (UTC−4)':'EST (UTC−5)');}function start(){if(document.getElementById('occ-wrap')){update();window._occTimer=setInterval(update,1000);}else{setTimeout(start,100);}}start();})();

components.content: By continuing, you acknowledge that there have been no material changes to your account information or eligibility status. Please notify Securitize and BlackRock of any changes by contacting investorsupport@securitize.io.
components.label: HTML

components.content: Section 1: Account Setup
components.label: HTML
Please select the type of account
If Omnibus is selected — will all beneficial holders of Fund shares in the account be natural persons?

components.content:
⚠
Additional review required — please do not proceed. Omnibus accounts with non-natural-person beneficial holders require additional AML documentation and separate review. Please contact Investor Support before continuing.

investorsupport@securitize.io
components.label: HTML

validate.custom: valid = (data.account_type !== 'omnibus' || data.omnibus_natural_persons !== 'no') ? true : 'Please contact Investor Support before proceeding.';

components.content:
Section 2: Account Information
To help detect and prevent money laundering, terrorist financing, and other financial crimes, applicable law requires financial institutions to obtain, verify, and record certain information identifying each registered owner of an account. Please provide a copy of your most recent Corporate Resolution, Certified Articles of Incorporation, Partnership Agreement, Trust Instrument, or other equivalent organizational document, preferably dated within the last 12 months.
components.label: HTML
Is this a government entity or government plan investment?
Name of government entity, plan/program, and jurisdiction (City, County, State)

components.content: Pay-to-Play Disclosure (Government Entities): BlackRock and its affiliates are subject to pay-to-play rules and related regulations governing political contributions. By proceeding, you confirm that no covered political contributions have been made that would disqualify this investment under applicable pay-to-play rules. This account will be flagged for additional compliance review. Contact investorsupport@securitize.io with any questions.
components.label: HTML

components.content:
Section 3: Account Communications
Electronic delivery is the fastest and most secure way to receive your account communications. Select your preferred delivery method for each communication type below, or opt in to all electronic delivery at once.
components.label: HTML
Opt in to electronic delivery for all communication types (Recommended)
Account statements, confirmations, tax forms, and related documents
Other notices, disclosures, regulatory communications, and Fund materials

components.content:
Section 5: Subscription Instructions
Securities are delivered on-chain. You must provide a KYC-verified digital wallet address registered with your Securitize account to receive your subscription. No USD wire delivery is available for subscription.
components.label: HTML

components.content: 5.1. Subscription Wallet Address (Required)
components.label: HTML
Wallet Address
components.placeholder: Enter your Ethereum (0x...) or Solana wallet address

components.content: Your wallet must be KYC-verified and registered with your Securitize account. Add or verify a wallet at id.sandbox.securitize.io/wallets.
components.label: HTML

components.content: Ethereum address detected. Your securities will be delivered as tokens on the Ethereum network. Please confirm below this is correct.
components.label: HTML

components.content: Solana address detected. Your securities will be delivered as tokens on the Solana network. Please confirm below this is correct.
components.label: HTML
I confirm this is an Ethereum wallet address and I expect to receive my securities on the Ethereum network.

validate.custom: valid = !(/^0x[a-fA-F0-9]{40}$/.test((data.sub_usdc_wallet || '').trim())) || input === true ? true : 'You must confirm your Ethereum wallet address.';

components.label: I confirm this is a Solana wallet address and I expect to receive my securities on the Solana network.

validate.custom: valid = !(/^[1-9A-HJ-NP-Za-km-z]{32,44}$/.test((data.sub_usdc_wallet || '').trim()) && !/^0x/.test((data.sub_usdc_wallet || '').trim())) || input === true ? true : 'You must confirm your Solana wallet address.';

components.content: Important — Wallet Address Disclosure: You are solely responsible for providing a correct, compatible, and KYC-verified wallet address registered with your Securitize account. Securities delivered to an incorrect or inaccessible wallet address cannot be recovered or reversed. Neither the Fund, BlackRock, nor Securitize will be liable for any loss resulting from an incorrect or inaccessible wallet address.
components.label: HTML

components.content:
Section 6: Redemption & Distribution Instructions
Select how you would like to receive redemption proceeds — by USD wire transfer or in USDC to a digital wallet. A primary instruction set is required.
components.label: HTML

components.content: Disclosures & Signatures
components.label: HTML

components.content:
State Unclaimed Property Law DisclosureThe assets in your account are subject to state unclaimed property laws which provide that if no activity occurs in your account within the time period specified by the particular state law, your assets must be transferred to the appropriate state.
Privacy Principles of BlackRock FundsBlackRock is committed to maintaining the privacy of its current and former fund investors and individual clients and to safeguarding their nonpublic personal information. BlackRock does not sell or disclose to nonaffiliated third parties any nonpublic personal information about its Clients, except as permitted by law or as necessary to respond to regulatory requests or to service Client accounts.
Important Notice: The U.S. Patriot ActTo help the U.S. Government fight the funding of terrorism and money laundering activities, Federal law requires all financial institutions to obtain, verify and record information that identifies persons opening accounts.
By the execution of this account application, the undersigned represents and warrants that it has the full right, power and authority to make the investment(s) applied for. The undersigned affirms that it has received and reviewed a current Fund Prospectus and is exercising independent judgment. In connection with any transaction, the undersigned acknowledges that: (1) They are opening an institutional account as defined in FINRA Rule 4512(c); (2) They are capable of evaluating investment risks independently; (3) They will notify BlackRock if anything in this account application ceases to be true; and (4) The information contained herein may be shared by BlackRock with its affiliates and regulators.
Important note: This application must be accompanied by a completed and signed W-9, W-8BEN-IMY, or W-8 (most recent versions) as applicable. Any applications not accompanied by a completed and signed form will be returned.
components.label: HTML
I have read and acknowledge the disclosures above, including the State Unclaimed Property Law Disclosure, Privacy Principles, and U.S. Patriot Act Notice.
